segments.text: These black containers are poisoning you. It sounds crazy, but it's true.
This is not normal plastic. It's actually toxic electronic waste. Black [music] plastic cannot be recycled easily. So, factories melt down old TV
casings and keyboards to make these bowls. This e-waste is full of dangerous flame retardants and heavy metals. And
do you know what happens when you pour [music] hot food into it? The heat activates those chemicals and they leech directly into your lunch. You think you
are eating healthy but you are consuming toxins linked to serious hormonal and [music] heart issues. This is hidden health crisis. The government needs to
ban [music] it immediately. If you agree, comment ban black plastic.
